summary: The change remains correct, complete, and fail-closed. Per-account recording returns nonzero before record construction or ledger access when either the account handle or PROVENANCE_SALT is missing, while preserving the intentional fleet/zero-dispatch sentinel path. The tests are non-vacuous: both missing-input cases assert exit status 1, and the raising API stub verifies that the guard short-circuits ledger access. Environment variables and the global API class are restored in the existing finally block. No trust check is weakened, no token-shaped value is emitted, and the diff contains no reviewer-directed prompt injection.
